product.name: Marsh Whisspurr W-AVR Acoustic Vibration Reduction Unit
product.description:
The Marsh Whisspurr Acoustic Vibration Reaction (AVR) unit has been designed to limit noise levels and vibrations from diaphragm compressors used in the water and wastewater treatment sectors.
Suitable for all types of compressor including; Bibus Secoh, Nitto and Charles Austen, the Marsh Whisspurr AVR unit is easily fitted inline between the compressor and air diffuser. If space permits, the Marsh Whisspurr unit should be fitted as close as possible to the compressor – preferably, inside the sewage treatment plant.
Please note, the Marsh Whisspurr Acoustic Vibration Reduction unit is chemically sealed and bolted shut, which creates a pressure vacuum when in operation. Any tampering, breaking of the seal, or removal of any bolts will invalidate the warranty and will prevent the unit from working effectively. This unit is also not suitable for side channel blowers.
What are the benefits of the Marsh Whisppurr Acoustic Vibration Reduction unit?
The Marsh Whisspurr Acoustic Vibration Reduction unit’s innovative design ensures that any noise pollution emanating from the compressor unit is dramatically reduced without hindering the overall performance of the treatment system. Rural areas, where continuous noise is a nuisance, particularly benefits from AVR unit’s noise and vibration reduction qualities.
Available in four standard sizes, the corrosion free Marsh Whisspurr AVR unit does not require any electrics and can be easily installed into existing wastewater and water treatment systems.
Features and Benefits

Innovative UK design (patent pending).
Significantly reduces compressor volume and vibration without reducing in air pressure from the compressor.
No increase in back pressure to the compressor.
The unit contains no moving parts and requires no electrics.
Can be easily retrofitted to existing compressors.
Hose tail is 20mm standard.
Ideal for rural areas where noise pollution is a nuisance.
Available in four standard sizes.
Manufactured from resin and glass polymer, making the unit corrosion free and invulnerable to warm/humid conditions.
Unit is dark green as standard.

Specification
Overall unit width: 142mm
Overall unit height (excluding hose tail):200mm240mm350mm450mm
Material (unit): Resin and Glass Polymer
Material (hose tail connections): Brass with Stainless Steel nuts and bolts.
Colour: Dark Green
product.variant_name: Marsh Whisspurr W-AVR Acoustic Vibration Reduction Unit Code W-AVR1

product.name: Marsh Cesspool Cesspit Tank
product.description:
The Marsh cesspool cesspit tank is a covered, watertight unit for storing raw household sewage. It has no outlet and relies on road transport for the removal of raw sewage. No biological treatment is involved.

Heavy duty shell as standard to enable installation in all ground conditions
Integral lifting eyes for improved on-site handling
Unique ‘keying-in’ lip to assist anchoring into granular or concrete surround

Modern environmental regulations either discourage or ban the use of cesspools (Cesspools are not permitted in Scotland), and instead connections to municipal sewage systems or package sewage treatment plants are encouraged or required.In many countries, planning and development regulations for the protection of the environment prevent home-owners who live close to rivers and environmentally sensitive areas from installing a cesspit or septic system, requiring a sewage treatment plant instead.
Please note, whoever empties your cesspool should be a registered Waste Carrier and hold a current discharge licence from the local water authority.
product.variant_name: Marsh 2800L Cesspool Cesspit Tank

product.name: Marsh Ultra Low Profile Advanced Sewage Treatment Plant
product.description: Marsh Ultra Shallow dig range of sewage treatment plants are ideal for areas that suffer from a high water table or hard rock conditions. The shallow range of sewage treatment plants are manufactured using the same materials and techniques as the Ultra Standard range. It just requires 30% less excavation due to the reduced height of the tank.The Ultra plant has been tested to EN12566:3-2005 this is highest testing standard for European testing. The high test results mean the Ultra can discharge direct to a ditch, watercourse or percolation bed.|The Ultra domestic sewage treatment plant comes with lifting eyes to make and unloading and installation faster and safer. We designed the Ultra plant to self-level on the base and with our unique pipe connections ensure the installation is undertaken efficiently and correctly.Features & Benefits: Marsh Ultra Low Profile Advanced Sewage Treatment PlantNo moving partsLow running and maintenance costsEasy installation with 'keying-in' lip and lifting eyesTested and certified to BSEN12566-350 year design life25 year structural guaranteePlease note: External Cabinet can be supplied free of charge, please state when ordering.

product.name: Marsh Portapurra Temporary Sewage Treatment Plant
product.description:
The portable and compact Portapura sewage treatment tank from Marsh Industries has been specifically designed for temporary accommodation (caravans/travel homes), site offices, site toilets and workshops. The Portapura can be installed above or below ground and treats domestic wastewater to a level that is 25 times better than the recommended EN standard.
What are the benefits of choosing Marsh Portapura?
This compact and portable sewage treatment tank is designed specifically for temporary buildings. Design objectives included performance, running costs, installation, transport and storage, making the Portapura the logical choice for sites where temporary buildings are required.
The Portapura’s compact design provides quick and easy installation (where below ground installation can be achieved in approximately 2 hours) with minimum visual impact on the surrounding landscape as well as simple and safe access for maintenance and cleaning.  Systems can be installed above ground and removed/stored when not in use.
The cost of installing and running the Portapura is minimal when compared to larger, commercial systems making it one of the more cost-effective sewage treatment tanks on the market.
Another benefit of choosing the Portapura sewage treatment tank is its impact on the environment. Being CE?approved to BS EN 12566 with an ammonia result that is 25 times better than the recommended EN standard means the Portapura is well within discharge consent requirements.
Technical

Available in three sizes - 2, 3 or 5 person units (gravity or pumped outlet)
Compact, lightweight construction - No heavy plant required
Portable
Cost effective installation - Below ground installation can be achieved in approximately 2 hours
Outstanding treatment efficiency - 14:19:0.7mg/ltr (BOD:Suspended solids:Ammonia)
Near silent air compressor - Ensures minimal running, maintenance and servicing costs
Electrical consumption: 1.8kWh/d - Equivalent to the daily use of a lightbulb
CE?approved to BS?EN 12566
Fire resistance tested in accordance with EN ISO 11925-2:210
Tested for structural integrity in accordance with EN ISO 179-1/1eA
Neck extensions are available for deeper installations

Do not install a Portapura treatment plant in water logged or uneven ground.
Do not remove the covers of the Portapura, or access the unit in any way, without firstly isolating the mains power.
product.variant_name: Marsh Portapura 2 Person Temporary Sewage Treatment Plant - Gravity

product.name: Marsh Ultra Polylok L Domestic Sewage Treatment Plant
product.description:
The Marsh Ultra:Polylok L (UPL) draws upon Marsh Industries’ extensive experience in the industrial and commercial sewage treatment sectors bringing its outstanding performance and added-value engineering to the domestic sector.The Marsh UPL is available in either a 6PE or a 12PE model, is approved to BS EN12566-3 and carries an impressive effluent quality of 20:30:20, within national consentstandards.
Both models are compact and easy to install, meeting the needs of installers and specifiers alike.
Features and Benefits

Tested and approved to the most stringent European Standards: EN12566-3:2005+A1:2009
Small footprint and shallow dig for easy installation provides enhanced health and safety benefits
Heavy duty shell as standard enables installation in all ground conditions.
Unique ‘keying-in’ lip assists anchoring into granular or concrete surrounds
Near silent, energy efficient compressor (located externally) with integral alarm (approximate annual running costs of £35 p/annum)
High specification bio-media (310m3per m2) and membrane diffuser ensures even circulation and maximum treatment efficiency
Unique Polylok tertiary filter reduces suspended solids and BOD by a further 40% helping to extend drainage field life
Sludge return pipe improves system circulation
Variable inverts for ease of installation at various depths - 250, 500 and 750mm risers available
Pumped outlets available
product.variant_name: Marsh Ultra Polylok L 6 Person Advanced Sewage Treatment Plant - Gravity

product.name: Marsh Ultra Polylok L Domestic Sewage Treatment Plant
product.description:
The Marsh Ultra:Polylok L (UPL) draws upon Marsh Industries’ extensive experience in the industrial and commercial sewage treatment sectors bringing its outstanding performance and added-value engineering to the domestic sector.The Marsh UPL is available in either a 6PE or a 12PE model, is approved to BS EN12566-3 and carries an impressive effluent quality of 20:30:20, within national consentstandards.
Both models are compact and easy to install, meeting the needs of installers and specifiers alike.
Features and Benefits

Tested and approved to the most stringent European Standards: EN12566-3:2005+A1:2009
Small footprint and shallow dig for easy installation provides enhanced health and safety benefits
Heavy duty shell as standard enables installation in all ground conditions.
Unique ‘keying-in’ lip assists anchoring into granular or concrete surrounds
Near silent, energy efficient compressor (located externally) with integral alarm (approximate annual running costs of £35 p/annum)
High specification bio-media (310m3per m2) and membrane diffuser ensures even circulation and maximum treatment efficiency
Unique Polylok tertiary filter reduces suspended solids and BOD by a further 40% helping to extend drainage field life
Sludge return pipe improves system circulation
Variable inverts for ease of installation at various depths - 250, 500 and 750mm risers available
Pumped outlets available

product.name: Marsh Ensign Sewage Treatment Plant - Gravity
product.description: With lifting eyes for quick and safe unloading, this Marsh Ensign domestic sewage treatment plant self-levels on the base. The unique and innovative pipe connections make for efficient and cost-effective installation. With various populations to choose from, you can find the right treatment plant for you.In normal ground conditions, the unit only needs a pea-shingle surround. The Ensign plant is best installed at a 7m distance from a dwelling or 10m from a stream. Engineered with high-performance materials, the treatment plants include metal components all made from stainless steel.Features & Benefits: Marsh Ensign Sewage Treatment Plant - GravityComes with internal compressor as standardDirects to ditches, watercourses or percolation bedsNo moving parts and minimal running and maintenance costsEasy to install with the lifting eyes and keying-in lip25-year structural guaranteeDesigned with a 50-year lifePackage Sewage Treatment Plants (PSTP's) are ideal when groundwater is vulnerable in its environment, drainage field percolation values are limiting, or direct discharge to watercourse or surface water sewer is the ideal method of discharge. This range effectively treats final effluent to relevant British and European Standards, meaning that it can be discharged back into the watercourse with national consent standards. The range of gravity or pumped outlets follows site requirements and contains 100% virgin resin (no chalk fillers). The minimum design life of the tank structure is 25 years (both internally and externally). The compressor blower has a 2-year guarantee and the diffuser has a 5-year guarantee.Standards & CertificationTested and certified to BSEN12566-3 2005Highest testing standard for European testing

product.name: Marsh Ensign Ultra Advanced Domestic Sewage Treatment Plant
product.description: The Ensign domestic sewage treatment plant comes with lifting eyes to make unloading and installation faster and safer. We designed the Ensign plant to self-level on the base and with our unique pipe connections ensure the installation is undertaken efficiently and correctly. The six person Ensign Sewage plant is extremely strong and is only 1.95m in depth with an inlet invert of 500mm, this design reduces both the time and cost of installation, in normal ground conditions the unit only requires a pea-shingle surround. For guidance ideally the Ensign plant should be 7m from a dwelling or10m from a stream.Package Sewage Treatment Plants (or PSTP's) are often a suitable option where groundwater in the surrounding environment is vulnerable, drainage field percolation values are restrictive, or direct discharge to watercourse or surface water sewer is the preferred discharge method. Marsh Industries Ensign range of sewage treatment plants treat final effluent to British and European Standards to allow it to be discharged back into the watercourse whilst reaching national consent standards. Our tanks can be manufactured with either a gravity or pumped outlet to meet your site requirements. At Marsh Industries we only use 100% virgin resin (no chalk fillers) in all our products. Lead times for Domestic Sewage Treatment Plants are normally only 5-7 working days. Comes with external compressor as standard.Features & Benefits: Marsh Ensign Ultra Advanced Domestic Sewage Treatment PlantNo moving partsLow running and maintenance costsEasy installation with keying-in lip and lifting eyesTested and certified to BSEN12566-350 year design life25 year structural guaranteeThe Ensign plant has been tested to EN12566:3-2005Highest testing standard for European testingThe Ensign can discharge direct to a ditch, watercourse or percolation bedSuitable for One 4 bed residence & Two 3 Bed Residences - 16 People or 25 people working.In addition to anaerobic digestion taking place in the primary settlement chamber the Ensign: Ultra unit allows the clarified water to pass into a second 'aeration' chamber where it is treated to remove the dissolved constituents. Here aerobic bacteria supported by diffused air and mobile media, ensures full treatment is achieved before the treated effluent and 'sloughed off' bacteria flows to a final settlement chamber. The final effluent is then discharged to the drainage field or watercourse via polylok filter.Please note: External Cabinet can be supplied free of charge, please state when ordering.
product.variant_name: Marsh Ensign Ultra 6 Person Advanced Sewage Treatment Plant - Gravity

product.name: Marsh Ensign Ultra Advanced Domestic Sewage Treatment Plant
product.description: The Ensign domestic sewage treatment plant comes with lifting eyes to make unloading and installation faster and safer. We designed the Ensign plant to self-level on the base and with our unique pipe connections ensure the installation is undertaken efficiently and correctly. The six person Ensign Sewage plant is extremely strong and is only 1.95m in depth with an inlet invert of 500mm, this design reduces both the time and cost of installation, in normal ground conditions the unit only requires a pea-shingle surround. For guidance ideally the Ensign plant should be 7m from a dwelling or10m from a stream.Package Sewage Treatment Plants (or PSTP's) are often a suitable option where groundwater in the surrounding environment is vulnerable, drainage field percolation values are restrictive, or direct discharge to watercourse or surface water sewer is the preferred discharge method. Marsh Industries Ensign range of sewage treatment plants treat final effluent to British and European Standards to allow it to be discharged back into the watercourse whilst reaching national consent standards. Our tanks can be manufactured with either a gravity or pumped outlet to meet your site requirements. At Marsh Industries we only use 100% virgin resin (no chalk fillers) in all our products. Lead times for Domestic Sewage Treatment Plants are normally only 5-7 working days. Comes with external compressor as standard.Features & Benefits: Marsh Ensign Ultra Advanced Domestic Sewage Treatment PlantNo moving partsLow running and maintenance costsEasy installation with keying-in lip and lifting eyesTested and certified to BSEN12566-350 year design life25 year structural guaranteeThe Ensign plant has been tested to EN12566:3-2005Highest testing standard for European testingThe Ensign can discharge direct to a ditch, watercourse or percolation bedSuitable for One 4 bed residence & Two 3 Bed Residences - 16 People or 25 people working.In addition to anaerobic digestion taking place in the primary settlement chamber the Ensign: Ultra unit allows the clarified water to pass into a second 'aeration' chamber where it is treated to remove the dissolved constituents. Here aerobic bacteria supported by diffused air and mobile media, ensures full treatment is achieved before the treated effluent and 'sloughed off' bacteria flows to a final settlement chamber. The final effluent is then discharged to the drainage field or watercourse via polylok filter.Please note: External Cabinet can be supplied free of charge, please state when ordering.

product.name: Marsh Ensign Pumped Domestic Sewage Treatment Plant
product.description:
The Marsh Ensign Pumped Domestic Sewage Treatment Plant is an effective solution for sewage treatment, designed to accommodate areas where a natural gravity flow is not feasible. By opting for a pumped treatment plant, the system will efficiently direct effluent to higher levels, ensuring an economical and environmentally friendly operation.
When installed correctly, the Marsh Ensign Pumped Domestic Sewage Treatment Plant operates virtually odour-free and near-silently, also offering a discreet design that will not create eyesores in your garden or outdoor spaces. It is recommended Ensign plants are positioned at a minimum distance of seven metres from a dwelling or ten metres from a stream.

product.name: Marsh Polylok Commercial Pumped Sewage Treatment Plant
product.description:
The plant has low visual impact with unobtrusive lids. Normally only needs a granular surround. The self aligning low profile means quicker installation low running costs est. At below £35 per annum for a six person.
Easy access integral separate de-sludge pipe and almost silent running & odour free. Its is manufactured in the united kingdom & is backed with a 25 year structural guarantee. Invert risers and pumped outlets can be supplied for deeper drain connections. Designed with integral recycling system that makes it ideal for intermittent use.
We can offer design and tech support and talk you through your project, please contact us at sales@drainagesuperstore.co.uk or call us on 01752 692221
Warranty & Guarantee

The minimum design life of the tank structure is twenty five years. (internally & externally)
The compressor blower is covered by a two year guarantee.
The diffuser is covered by a five year guarantee.
Engineered using high performance materials.
All metal components stainless steel.

product.name: Marsh Polylok Commercial Sewage Treatment Plant
product.description:
The plant has low visual impact with unobtrusive lids. Easy access integral separate de-sludge pipe and almost silent running & odour free. Its is manufactured in the united kingdom & is backed with a 25 year structural guarantee. Invert risers and pumped outlets can be supplied for deeper drain connections. Designed with integral recycling system that makes it ideal for intermittent use.
Features

Endogeneous respiration, reducing the sludge and increasing the amount of dissolved oxygen in the primary chamber.
For Increased health and safety we fit our large plants with stabalising feet to protect the civil engineering installation team from being injured because of the movement and roll of the sewage treatment plant.
We fit kiddie-guards into our turrets to prevent either adults, children or animals falling into the plant during maintenance, this is an added assurance to our bolt down covers.
Carbon Vents will be fitted into our manhole covers reducing the need for external venting.
After the process is completed we fit a Polylok Tertiary Filter that reduces further the final suspended solids by 40% and further improves the final BOD.

Warranty & guarantee

The minimum design life of the tank structure is twenty five years. (internally & externally)
The compressor blower is covered by a two year guarantee.
The diffuser is covered by a five year guarantee.
Engineered using high performance materials.
All metal components stainless steel.

product.name: Marsh Polylok Commercial Sewage Treatment Plant
product.description:
The plant has low visual impact with unobtrusive lids. Easy access integral separate de-sludge pipe and almost silent running & odour free. Its is manufactured in the united kingdom & is backed with a 25 year structural guarantee. Invert risers and pumped outlets can be supplied for deeper drain connections. Designed with integral recycling system that makes it ideal for intermittent use.
Features

Endogeneous respiration, reducing the sludge and increasing the amount of dissolved oxygen in the primary chamber.
For Increased health and safety we fit our large plants with stabalising feet to protect the civil engineering installation team from being injured because of the movement and roll of the sewage treatment plant.
We fit kiddie-guards into our turrets to prevent either adults, children or animals falling into the plant during maintenance, this is an added assurance to our bolt down covers.
Carbon Vents will be fitted into our manhole covers reducing the need for external venting.
After the process is completed we fit a Polylok Tertiary Filter that reduces further the final suspended solids by 40% and further improves the final BOD.

Warranty & guarantee

The minimum design life of the tank structure is twenty five years. (internally & externally)
The compressor blower is covered by a two year guarantee.
The diffuser is covered by a five year guarantee.
Engineered using high performance materials.
All metal components stainless steel.
product.variant_name: Marsh Polylok 70 Person Commercial Sewage Treatment Plant - Gravity

product.name: Marsh:Standard Commercial Sewage Treatment Plant
product.description:
Marsh:Standard sewage treatment plants are a cost-effective way of treating sewage and wastewater in an off-mains area. For large residential, commercial and industrial sites, including leisure sites, Marsh:Standard sewage treatment plants will provide biological processing for effluent until it’s of a quality well within the British Water effluent standard.
This sewage treatment plant will provide effluent treatment for up to 85 people. Manufactured in the UK, the tank is made from GRP virgin unfilled resin to provide a durable and structurally secure tank that has consistent wall thickness and no fillers in the material. Built this way in part as a safety feature, Marsh:Standard plants also have turret guards and failure alarms for extra peace of mind.
A low energy compressor and high specification bacteria keep the Marsh:Standard sewage treatment plant running smoothly as the bacteria along with membrane diffusers ensure the circulation of effluent so that it’s all treated. The low energy compressor minimises running costs whilst the system needs minimal maintenance as the system itself has no moving parts.
Approved to BS12566, the heavy duty shell provides a long life for Marsh:Standard sewage treatment plants. Alarms and 600mm lockable manhole covers are as standard.
product.variant_name: Marsh:Standard Sewage Treatment Plant - 200 People

product.name: Marsh Sewage Treatment Plant Riser Upgrade
product.description:
This is the cost to upgrade a Marsh sewage tank with a riser during the manufacturing process. These risers must be bought in conjunction with a Marsh sewage tank.
 
Technical Information
The upgrade risers are not trimmable, please contact the sales team as Marsh can cater to different inverts.
product.variant_name: Marsh Sewage Treatment Plant 500mm Riser - UPGRADE

product.name: Marsh Sewage Treatment Plant Retro-Fit Trimmable Riser
product.description:
Supplied with all bolts and fittings these Retro Fitting Risers are for Marsh Ensign sewage treatment plants that have already been installed.This can be cut down using a jigsaw blade/saw etc.
Due to the design of the Marsh 12 Person tanks we are unable to supply trimmable risers. You will need to purchase the standard tank risers and retrofit on site

product.name: Marsh Non-Return Valve for Underground Sewage System
product.description:
These Marsh non-return valves are for use with the Marsh Underground Sewage Treatment Systems.
They fit either an 110mm pipe or an 160mm pipe.
Non-return valves allow for a flow in only one direction and is fitted to ensure that the flows go through a pipe in the right direction, where pressure conditions may otherwise cause reversed flow.
product.variant_name: Marsh Non-Return Valve for Underground Sewage System - 110mm

product.name: Marsh Euro Septic Tank - Spherical
product.description: The EN Onion Septic range allows the solids to settle in the form of sludge with the lighter liquid undergoing a biological process through the contact with the oxygen. This allows the solids to further break down, the lighter liquid still contains smaller particles of solids and high levels of BOD but passes through the septic tank into the drainage field.

product.name: Marsh ENCO Domestic Sewage Treatment Plant - Pumped Outlet
product.description: The Marsh ENCO range of domestic sewage treatment plants with a pumped outlet is an ideal solution for regions where drainage is difficult and natural gravity flow is not possible. Manufactured and tested in adherence to the highest British and European standards, these sewage treatment plants, available in options for 6 to 16 people, boast high performance, accompanied by a reassuring 10-year warranty. Suitable for diverse domestic applications, they ensure the treated effluent meets national consent standards, making it safe for release back into the main watercourse.The ENCO range stands out with its sleek black lids and lifting eyes, which allow for easy installation. Enhanced durability is achieved through the inclusion of stainless steel components and the use of 100% virgin resin, devoid of chalk fillers. Notably, the sewage treatment plants feature unique pipe connections, making them not only cost-effective but also easy to operate. Installation guidelines recommend a distance of 7 metres from any dwelling or 10 meters from a stream or river.Features & Benefits: Marsh ENCO Domestic Sewage Treatment Plant - Pumped OutletEnvironmentally friendly domestic sewage treatment plants for areas where natural gravity flow is not feasibleDirect effluent to higher levels with a pumpHighly innovative pipe connections allow for quick and cost-effective installationLifting eyes for easy unloading and self-levelling on the base10-year warrantyHighest testing standard for British & European testing
product.variant_name: Marsh ENCO 6 Person Domestic Sewage Treatment Plant - Pumped Outlet

product.name: Marsh ENCO Domestic Sewage Treatment Plant - Gravity Outlet
product.description: The ENCO range of domestic sewage treatment plants from Marsh, available in 6 to 16 population options, is a perfect solution for areas where groundwater is vulnerable and drainage is problematic. Manufactured and tested to the highest British and European standards, these high-performance sewage treatment plants come with a 10-year warranty and are suitable for a wide range of domestic applications. The final effluent is safe to be released back to the main watercourse in accordance with national consent standards.With sleek black lids and lifting eyes for reliable unloading, the ENCO range also features stainless steel parts for greater durability and benefits from 100% virgin resin, with no chalk fillers. Thanks to the highly innovative pipe connections, these sewage treatment plants with a gravity outlet are affordable and straightforward to install and use. They should be fitted 7 metres away from the home or 10 metres away from a river or stream. The final effluent is safe to be released back to the main watercourse in accordance with national consent standards.With sleek black lids and lifting eyes for reliable unloading, the ENCO range also features stainless steel parts for greater durability and benefits from 100% virgin resin, with no chalk fillers. Thanks to the highly innovative pipe connections, these sewage treatment plants with a gravity outlet are affordable and straightforward to install and use. They should be fitted 7 metres away from the home or 10 metres away from a river or stream. product.name: Marsh Phos-Lite Phosphate Reduction Sewage Treatment Plant
product.description: Purify your wastewater naturally & efficiently with the Marsh Phos-Lite Phosphate Reduction Sewage Treatment Plant, a groundbreaking, chemical-free solution ideal for enhancing environmental compliance. This innovative tertiary treatment unit uses a unique adsorption process to bind phosphorus to naturally occurring media, consistently delivering effluent phosphate concentrations as low as 0.2 mg/L, as certified by PIA GmbH. Compact yet powerful, Phos-Lite is designed for flexibility, handling systems from 4 up to 25 PE. Its energy efficient operation draws only 0.03 kWh per day, ensuring negligible running costs. Whether integrated with new setups or retrofitted to existing treatment plants, Phos-Lite enhances water quality without dosing chemicals, making it a sustainable & cost-effective upgrade.Features & Benefits: Marsh Phos-Lite Phosphate Reduction Sewage Treatment PlantChemical-free phosphate removalDesigned for seamless integration into existing systemsSuccessfully meets the requirements of EN ISO 1192502:2010 standards
product.variant_name: Marsh Phos-Lite Phosphate Reduction Sewage Treatment Plant - 4 Person

product.name: Marsh Nutra-Lite SBR Advanced Sewage Treatment Plant
product.description: Engineered for modern off-grid living, the Marsh Nutra-Lite SBR Advanced Sewage Treatment Plant harnesses cutting-edge Sequential Batch Reactor (SBR) technology for superior effluent quality. This compact system, operates using purely biological processes, delivering 84% reduction in nitrates without requiring chemicals or carbon dosing.Its innovative design includes a self-cleaning, self-sealing sediment reduction valve, delivering high reliability and low maintenance by minimizing mechanical components. Built for longevity and performance, the Nutra-Lite features sturdy GRP construction tested to fire safety standards. Independently tested and certified under BS EN 12566-3, the Nutra-Lite stands as a trusted solution for wastewater treatment that meets the most demanding environmental standards.Features & Benefits: Marsh Nutra-Lite SBR Advanced Sewage Treatment PlantNutra-Lite excels in phosphate & nitrate removalUnlike traditional methods, no chemicals or carbon are usedCan be adapted to seasonal changes in biological treatment, ensuring optimal year-round performance

product.name: Marsh Sump2Drain Sewage Pump Station with 6m Head - Single Pump
product.description: The Marsh Sump2Drain Sewage Pump Station is a compact, foul water pumping solution designed for properties where gravity drainage isn't possible. product.name: Marsh Sump2Drain MDPE Sewage Pump Station - Grinder Pump
product.description: The Marsh Sump2Drain Grinder Twin Pump Station is designed for sites where traditional gravity drainage cannot be installed. product.name: Marsh Sump2Drain Sewage Pump Station with 6m Head - Twin Pump
product.description: The Marsh Sump2Drain Sewage Pump Station is a dependable foul water pumping system for properties where wastewater must be lifted to reach the sewer or treatment plant. Made from corrosion-resistant GRP, with a moulded keying-in lip that anchors securely into concrete, the station is supplied as a complete unit with twin pumps so it can operate on an automatic duty/assist cycle to provide dependable performance. And for extra peace of mind, each twin pump model comes with a high-level alarm, essential for monitoring water levels and preventing failure.Suitable for larger domestic properties and light commercial applications, the system collects wastewater from toilets, kitchens, showers and appliances before discharging it safely to the mains sewer, septic tank or treatment plant. The 6m head provides up to 6 metres of lifting capability for moderate pipe runs or lower discharge points.Features & Benefits: Marsh Sump2Drain Sewage Pump Station with 6m Head - Twin Pump24 hour twin pump duty/standby operation with 50mm solid handling pumpHeavy-duty GRP with 63mm outlet connectionsIncludes high level alarmStandards & CertificationComplies with BSEN752-6 standards.

And for extra peace of mind, each twin pump model comes with a high-level alarm, essential for monitoring water levels and preventing failure.Suitable for larger domestic properties and light commercial applications, the system collects wastewater from toilets, kitchens, showers and appliances before discharging it safely to the mains sewer, septic tank or treatment plant. The 10m head provides the extra lifting capability needed for longer pipe runs or higher discharge points.Features & Benefits: Marsh Sump2Drain Sewage Pump Station with 10m Head - Twin Pump24 hour twin pump duty/standby operation with 50mm solid handling pumpHeavy-duty GRP with 63mm outlet connectionsIncludes high level alarmStandards & CertificationComplies with BSEN752-6 standards.
product.variant_name: Marsh Sump2Drain Sewage Twin Pump Station with 10m Head - 1200mm x 2500mm

product.name: Hook on Gas Meter Box
product.description: Manufactured from 2mm thick durable and weather-resistant aluminium, these Hook on Gas Meter Boxes are available in two sizes and designed to replace surface-mounted gas or electric meter boxes by hooking onto the existing backplate.The boxes are built to last and withstand even the harshest of conditions. Its sleek and modern design not only looks great but also provides easy access to your utilities, making it the perfect addition to any home or business. For security, the door features two budget locks, keeping the door securely closed in high winds and helping to prevent tampering.Features & Benefits: Hook on Gas Meter BoxAvailable in two sizesMade from durable and weather-resistant 2mm thick aluminiumHooks onto existing backplateFeatures two budget locks for added securityVented for gasEquipped with rust-proof 316 stainless steel piano hinges for efficient operationThe doors are vented for gas, with both boxes also fitted with full-length rust-proof 316 stainless steel piano hinges, ensuring long-lasting and efficient operation. Please note: Additional sizes can be produced to your requirements upon request.

product.name: Naylor Land Drain Coil End Cap
product.description:
The minimum depth of cover on any piped drain should be at least 450mm to protect the pipe from damage due to the surface traffic or maintenance operations such as deep spiking.
A non-kite marked product, this is an ideal cost effective solution for most projects.
Please note: colour and product style may vary on geographical location, If you need a specific type of cap please call.

product.name: Naylor Land Drainage Coil Pipe
product.description: From Naylor, this land drain coil pipe is ideal for use as a collector drain - particularly in the removal of surplus water that builds on the surface of fields and gardens to an appropriate collection point. Available in a range of sizes and perforated and unperforated options, you can find the pipe best suited to your applications.With a high-density and single-wall polyethylene structure that accommodates quick and simple installation, as well as being a cost-effective and versatile way of achieving great water flow, this pipe is a non-kite marked product that is ideal for various agricultural uses and subsoil field drainage.Features & Benefits: Naylor Land Drainage Coil PipeVarious size options for purchaseVersatile and cost-effectivePerforated or unperforated structuresPerfect for use as a collector drainNon-kite markedSuited to various projects and applicationsPiped drains should include a minimum depth of cover of at least 450mm. This serves to defend the pipe from any damage that may occur with surface traffic or during maintenance operations such as deep spiking.Standards & CertificationLand drainage is made in accordance with BS4962:1989Complies with BS EN ISO 9001:2008 (Certificate No:  FM 01420)Please note: This product comes in coils with a pre-fitted coupler in a range of lengths.Not suitable as a dispersal drain for septic tanks.Long-term outdoor storage can lead to damage from UV degradation. Naylor do not recommend storage longer than 12 months.
product.variant_name: Naylor Perforated Land Drain Coil Pipe - 60mm x 50m

product.name: Naylor Land Drain Pipe Filter Sock Geotextile
product.description: Naylor's land drain pipe filter sock geotextile is a great addition to pipe systems. Particularly in sandy and silty soil conditions.A special knit fabric, this sock allows very fine soil particles to pass through and into the perforated pipe, then subsequently discharged from the drainage pipe with water. The fabric prevents larger soil particles from passing through the fabric, causing a bridge against each other on the outer surface of the fabric. An example of this is granular backfill materials.  The bridging effect of these soil particles improves the permeability of the native backfill materials and immediately surrounds the perforated drainage pipe.Features & Benefits: Naylor Land Drain Pipe Filter Sock GeotextileSuitable for sandy and silty soil conditionsKnit fabricPrevents large soil particles from passing throughAllows fine soil particles to pass through
product.variant_name: Naylor Land Drain Pipe Filter Sock Geotextile - 60mm x 150m

product.name: Naylor Pre-Loaded Land Drain Pipe Filter Sock Geotextile
product.description:
The specially knit fabric allows very fine soil particles to pass through and into the perforated pipe that are subsequently discharged from the drainage pipe with the water. The remaining larger soil particles that are blocked from passing through the fabric, bridge against each other on the outer surface of the fabric. Like granular backfill materials, the bridging effect of these soil particles improves the permeability of the native backfill materials immediately surrounding the perforated drainage pipe. It is particularly suited for use in sandy and silty soil conditions.

Prevents Clogging - Keeps water flowing
Screens out sand & sediment
No need For special backfill
Millions of meters in use worldwide
Residential
Commercial
Agricultural
product.variant_name: Naylor Pre-Loaded Land Drain Pipe Filter Sock Geotextile - 80mm x 30m

product.name: Naylor Underground Twinwall Electric Duct Cable - 6m
product.description: In the colour black, this MetroDuct Underground Twinwall Electric Cable Duct from Naylor is made from heavy-duty and high-density polyethylene. The external corrugated profile incorporates additional strength into the structure, and the internal bore is made to be smooth and, in turn, stops cables from snagging and tugging during use and keeps them in peak condition.This ducting is designed to be lightweight and flexible, making for seamless installation and easy handling that minimises excess time and energy. It comes available in an array of pipe diameters to suit different electrical applications and needs.Features & Benefits: Naylor Underground Twinwall Electric Duct Cable - 6mBlack in colour for electrical useDurable and corrugated polyethylene constructionEasy to handle and install due to lightweight structureSmooth internal bore to prevent tugging of cablesCorresponding duct coupler provided6m lengthTo ensure high quality, this ducting is manufactured to meet BBA (British Board of Agrément) guidelines and BS EN61386 standards, meaning it can effectively comply with Highways Agency regulations.Please note: This product does not come with a built-in drawcord.These products are supplied in 2 x 3m lengths with a coupler
product.variant_name: Underground Twinwall Electric Cable Ducting 137/160mm x 6m Black

product.name: Naylor Ducting Coil Coupler
product.description: Naylor's cutting-edge ducting systems are tailored to meet the demands of civil, utility and telecommunication markets. The ducts embody the perfect fusion of lightweight flexibility, formidable strength and enduring durability.This Ducting Coil Coupler is your key to seamlessly connecting Naylor Ducting. Its sleek black finish serves as a clear indicator for safeguarding electric cables. Made from robust polyethylene, the duct pipes are available in convenient 6m length or 50m coils. The external corrugated design ensures added sturdiness, while the smooth internal bore prevents cable snags. When water-tight joints are necessary, simply utilise two profile seals.Features & Benefits: Naylor Ducting Coil CouplerLightweight and durableDesigned for electric cable protectionAvailable in a range of diametersBlack colourFor connecting Naylor ducting pipesThe Naylor ducting system comprises three vital components: Ducting Pipes, Access Chambers and Covers and Frames. Rest assured, Naylor's 50mm to 300mm ducting complies with BBA and BS EN61386 standards, meeting the stringent requirements of the Highways Agency.Please note: These products are supplied in 2 x 3m lengths with a coupler
product.variant_name: Ducting Coil Coupler 63mm

product.description: This Underground Electric Cable Ducting Coil is a part of Naylor's premium MetroDuct Twinwall Ducting System. Available in a range of sizes, this ducting coil is designed for underground electric cable applications. product.name: Naylor MetroDrain Twinwall Surface Water Pipe - 3m
product.description:
An excellent alternative to traditional clayware and concrete pipes, this lightweight and high-performance corrugated HDPE Naylor MetroDrain Twinwall Surface Water Pipe is a high-strength solution designed for use with all non-pressure, surface and sub-surface storm water drainage applications.
Featuring a smooth bore, which ensures a superior hydraulic flow, this 3m long pipe is suitable for non-adopted surface water drains subject to Building Regulations and Standards throughout the UK. MetroDrain is also ideal for use in environmental systems, such as soakaways, pump and sampling chambers and stormwater attenuation systems.
Features & Benefits: Naylor MetroDrain Twinwall Surface Water Pipe - 3mAn excellent alternative to traditional clayware and concrete pipesFeatures a solid, lightweight and high-performance corrugated HDPE constructionSuitable for use with all non-pressure, surface and sub-surface storm water drainage applicationsSmooth bore ensures a superior hydraulic flowIdeal for cold weather applications and less brittle, less vulnerable to crack propagationCan be adopted under the Highways Act 1980Ideal for soakaways, pump and sampling chambers and stormwater attenuation systemsCan be used in landfill applications for methane gas control and leachate drainageProvides a drainage solution to recreational grounds, such as sports fields and golf courses
MetroDrain meets the specific requirements of the Highways Agency Manual of Contract Documents for Highway Works and is an approved alternative to the products in Table 5/1 of the Specification for Highway Works. In landfill applications, MetroDrain can also be successfully used for methane gas control and leachate drainage.
Standards & CertificationBBA Approved.

product.name: Naylor Land Drain Pipe 50mm Filter Sock Geotextile
product.description: Designed to complement Naylor Land Drain Pipes, this 50mm Filter Sock Geotextile is made from a specially knit fabric, which offers a unique solution by allowing ultra-fine soil particles to effortlessly flow through, joining the perforated pipe. As water flows, these fine particles are efficiently carried away, ensuring optimal drainage performance. What's more, this Filter Sock Geotextile also plays a crucial role in retaining larger soil particles. These particles, unable to pass through the fabric, create a bridging effect on its outer surface. This not only provides additional structural support but also enhances the permeability of the surrounding native backfill materials, mimicking the benefits of granular backfill. This geotextile is especially well-suited for sand and silty soil conditions. Features & Benefits: Naylor Land Drain Pipe 50mm Filter Sock GeotextileDesigned for use with Naylor Land Drain PipesSpecially knit fabric allows fine soil particles to flow throughLarger soil particles are retained, creating a bridging effectImproves permeability of native backfill materialsIdeal for sand and silty soil conditionsAvailable in a range of lengths

product.name: Lindab Magestic Half Round Galvanised Steel Downpipe Connector
product.description: This Magestic downpipe connector is available in a range of diameters to connect two downpipes together, providing a male/female connection. Manufactured from galvanised steel with a strengthened magnesium zinc alloy coating offers the greatest surface protection for this coated steel connector which ages superbly, settling into an attractive dark grey metallic appearance after 3-5 years from installation.With elite galvanisation, this connector uses magnesium to create a stable barrier, protecting zinc's porous structure against corrosion issues with salt spray tests demonstrating more than 20 times the corrosion resistance of zinc galvanised steel without magnesium. With improved edge protection, this connector's galvanised coating migrates to repair red rust on scratches and cuts with self-healing properties and has ultimate resistance in aggressive environments with more than 3 times the corrosion resistance of standard galvanisation in marine environments. product.name: Lindab Magestic Galvanised Steel Gutter
product.description: This half-round gutter has been roll-formed with 0.6mm thick steel and has a bead stiffened front. Quick and easy to join using click and lock gutter joints or a roll joint method, this gutter is available in a range of diameters and lengths to fit your building and Magestic half round gutter requirements.Made with a strengthening magnesium zinc alloy coating to galvanise this steel gutter's surface, provides the ultimate surface protection. This superior galvanisation with magnesium protects the porous structure of zinc, creating a stable barrier against corrosion. With over twenty times the corrosion resistance of standard zinc galvanised steel without magnesium, demonstrated when salt spray tested, this gutter has improved edge protection with self-healing properties from the galvanised coating which migrates to repair red rust on cuts and scratches.Features & Benefits: Lindab Magestic Galvanised Steel GutterQuick and easy to install  Made to last with minimal thermal movement  Weathers naturally to a dark grey metallic surface  Resistant to corrosion and vandalism  Low environmental impact with reduced consumption of zinc steel  Affordable and cost-effective  Enhanced surface protection with magnesium zinc alloy and self-healing properties  Not influenced by the chlorine content of an environment  Suitable for coastal environments  Range of lengths and diameters availableSettling into an attractive dark grey metallic appearance, this gutter ages superbly after 3-5 years from installation. With more than three times the corrosion resistance of standard galvanised steel in marine settings, this gutter has the ultimate resistance when faced with aggressive environments.  This gutter has a stylish design, suitable for a variety of buildings including large or small, contemporary or classic buildings. This gutter is intended for long-term use and the recyclable steel material ensures that the environment is never second best. This steel can be repurposed and still maintains its properties, with a low impact on zinc resources.Standards & CertificationFulfils A1 according to EN 13501-1:2007+A1: 2009

product.name: Lindab Magestic Half Round Galvanised Steel Sliding Downpipe
product.description: Designed for use alongside an RT drain trap, this steel Round sliding downpipe is installed around the pipe and seamlessly slides to allow for access. By doing so, there is room for the system to undergo any necessary maintenance.Manufactured from sturdy galvanised steel, Lindab coats its Magestic rainwater range in a protective layer of magnesium zinc alloy. This makes for a resilient selection of guttering and fittings that are saltwater tested (ISO 9227), around 20 times more corrosion resistant than regular galvanised zinc, and the reduced zinc makes them more environmentally friendly. product.name: Lindab Magestic Half Round Galvanised Steel Downpipe Shoe
product.description:
This Lindab steel Round downpipe shoe comes available in multiple diameters to suit your downpipe systems. By joining at the bottom of the downpipe, it discharges rainwater to the drain. The socketed end easily fits onto the downpipe and makes installation incredibly simple.From the Magestic range, this downpipe shoe is made of galvanised steel. The magnesium zinc alloy makes for commendable resistance to corrosion and features self-healing properties that restore rust and scratches. This downpipe shoe has been tested to hold up in coastal and marine environments with salt spray to relevant International Standards (ISO 9227).

The socketed end easily fits onto the downpipe and makes installation incredibly simple.From the Magestic range, this downpipe shoe is made of galvanised steel. The magnesium zinc alloy makes for commendable resistance to corrosion and features self-healing properties that restore rust and scratches. This downpipe shoe has been tested to hold up in coastal and marine environments with salt spray to relevant International Standards (ISO 9227).

product.name: Lindab Magestic Rectangular Galvanised Steel Drain Shoe
product.description: This steel Round drain shoe has been strategically constructed by Lindab to attach a downpipe to a ground-level drain pipe, in turn filling the gap between them. The drain shoe is designed to be slightly bigger than the downpipe to allow for maintenance. Galvanised with a coating of magnesium zinc alloy, this Round drain shoe is a member of the high-quality Magestic range by Lindab. This means that it is highly resistant to the effects of corrosion and rust. If purchased, your drain shoe will provide you with longevity use, even in coastal and marine areas - all Magestic products are tested to International Standards (ISO 9227) and possess a striking ability to fight off distortion caused by saltwater. product.name: Lindab Magestic Galvanised Steel Straight Overflow Protector
product.description: From Lindab's Magestic galvanised steel range, this straight overflow protector is perfect for incorporating into your rainwater systems by hooking onto the gutter bead. It prevents overspill in the areas that may experience particularly high flow. When you need a rainwater system that deters corrosion and resists damage, the Magestic rainwater system from Lindab is perfect for you. The magnesium zinc alloy coating means that the already strong and resilient steel is even stronger, and combats rusting even better than regular galvanised zinc. This overflow protector, like the rest of the range, has undergone rigorous saltwater spray testing to assure that saltwater will not rapidly deteriorate the steel and that it can perform faultlessly in coastal or marine applications.Features & Benefits: Lindab Magestic Galvanised Steel Straight Overflow ProtectorComes in a variety of gutter diameters to fit your requirements  Affordable and lasts extended time periods  Self-healing properties to repair damage  Advanced surface protection  Lessened impact on zinc resources  Meets International Standards (ISO 9227)  Unpainted surface will fade to darker grey.

product.name: Lindab Magestic Half Round Galvanised Steel Downpipe Conical Bend
product.description: This Round Conical downpipe bend from Lindab has a 70° bend. It creates smooth lines while utilising Lindab's Magestic technology. With male/female connection, the top end of this downpipe connects with outlets and the bottom end connects with pipes. Like the rest of Lindab's Magestic collection, this Conical downpipe bend is reinforced with fantastic magnesium zinc alloy. The innovative coating helps your downpipe bend to stand the test of time, even when fighting all sorts of wear and tear. Red rust is no match for the galvanised steel as it can withstand 20 times more corrosion than zinc coatings without the additional magnesium - not only that, but it also makes for a more environmentally friendly product.Features & Benefits: Lindab Magestic Half Round Galvanised Steel Downpipe Conical BendAvailable in several diameters  Unpainted steel that turns into a dark metallic grey with time  Magnesium migrates to repair scratches, cuts, and red rusting  Can be installed in marine and coastal environments due to saltwater testing (ISO 9227)  Easy to install with male/female connections.

product.name: Lindab Magestic Rectangular Galvanised Steel Intermediate Downpipe
product.description: This intermediate pipe easily cuts into suitable pieces for your required lengths. Typically used to make an offset with less than 100mm projection, this downpipe can be cut to make two short pipes. The 1m length option is supplied with double spigot male ends while the 0.5m downpipe is supplied with male/female ends.This downpipe is available in a range of diameters to fit your Magestic round downpipes. Made from galvanised steel, this downpipe has a strengthening magnesium zinc alloy coating which provides the highest surface protection for coated steel surfaces. Ageing superbly, this downpipe settles into an attractive dark grey metallic exterior after 3-5 years from installation. Providing elite galvanisation with magnesium, this downpipe has a stable barrier against corrosion issues and protects the porous structure of zinc. This downpipe demonstrates more than twenty times the corrosion resistance of standard zinc galvanised steel without magnesium when salt spray tested.  Features & Benefits: Lindab Magestic Rectangular Galvanised Steel Intermediate DownpipeAvailable in a range of lengths and diameters to fit your Magestic round downpipes  Not influenced by the chlorine content of an environment  Affordable and cost-effective  Resistant to corrosion and vandalism  Made to last with minimal thermal movement  Easy and quick to install  Weathers naturally to a dark grey metallic surface  Low environmental impact with reduced consumption of zinc resources  Superior surface protection with magnesium zinc alloy  Improved performance in coastal environmentsWith improved edge protection from the galvanised coating, this downpipe has self-healing qualities and migrates to repair red rust on cuts and scratches. Over three times the corrosion resistance of standard galvanised steel in marine environments, this downpipe has the ultimate resistance when facing aggressive environments. This downpipe is ideal for domestic or commercial, traditional or modern properties.

product.description: From Lindab's inventive and sophisticated Magestic galvanised collection of rainwater systems, this steel Round downpipe is available in an array of lengths and diameters. When installed, it efficiently and smoothly guides the collected rainwater from the guttering outlet down towards the drainage system. This steel downpipe is incredibly long-lasting due to its perfected and high-performing galvanised zinc coating. While effectively combatting irritable rusting and corrosion, the magnesium zinc alloy protects the downpipe against the nasty effects of saltwater (tested to ISO 9227), making it suitable for marine environments and builds that live on the coast. Features & Benefits: Lindab Galvanised Steel DownpipeVariety of lengths and diameters to purchase  Unpainted  Equipped with discreet male/female joints  0.6mm roll-formed steel and 0.7mm with 120mm downpipes  Straightforward installations  Self-healing properties due to the galvanised coating that repairs scratches and rust  Meets International Standards for combatting saltwater corrosion (ISO 9227)  Environmentally friendly  Affordable and long-lasting.

product.name: Lindab Magestic Square Galvanised Steel Hopper
product.description: For installation at the top of a pipe, this steel Square hopper head collects additional rainwater while adding a bit of flair to traditional systems. It is particularly suited to roofing that has standing seam panels.Being that this hopper head is part of the Magestic range, it is introduced to a whole variety of benefits. The magnesium zinc alloy coating means that the galvanised steel construction is incredibly durable and immensely resilient. Not only does the added magnesium work to effectively repair scratches and rust, but it also relieves the environment of excess zinc and defends the hopper head against saltwater erosion. Features & Benefits: Lindab Magestic Square Galvanised Steel HopperPick the appropriate downpipe diameter from a wide range of options  Unpainted but the colour will fade to a dark metallic grey  Cost-efficient and ages well  Meets International Standards and withstands saltwater spray (ISO 9227)  Works brilliantly, even in coastal/marine areas  Amazing surface protection.
product.variant_name: Lindab Magestic 100mm Square Galvanised Steel Large Downpipe Hopper

product.name: Lindab Magestic Half Round Galvanised Steel Rainwater Diverter
product.description: With an outlet that can be opened or closed, this steel Round rainwater diverter allows for saving water in a water butt/tank. It can be installed in a pipe stack, either prior to the downpipe or after it.This steel construction is galvanised with magnesium zinc alloy, in turn reinforcing it with durability and resilience against damage from corrosion and rust. Lindab's Magestic range of rainwater products is tested to International Standards (ISO 9227) and found to excellently withstand the effects of saltwater spray. The galvanised steel is unpainted but, as it ages, your rainwater diverter will gradually fade into a deeper metallic grey. Features & Benefits: Lindab Magestic Half Round Galvanised Steel Rainwater DiverterFeatures a wide downpipe diameter range  Environmentally friendly  Cost-efficient and long-wearing  Self-healing as the magnesium fixes red rust and scratches  Appropriate for a wide array of applications, including coastal and marine  Ages fantastically.

product.name: Lindab Magestic Galvanised Steel Fascia Bracket
product.description: This bracket is ideal for securing the Magestic galvanised steel half round gutters by fixing to vertical fascia boards. With a solid 5mm steel structure and 1 standard screw hole and 1 oval hole, this bracket should be installed to create a fall of 10mm per 3.0m run and is recommended a maximum of 800mm interval spacing.This bracket is available in a range of diameters to fit your gutters. Manufactured from galvanised steel with a strengthening magnesium zinc alloy coating, this fascia bracket provides the greatest surface protection for this coated steel surface. This fascia bracket ages superbly, settling into an attractive dark grey metallic surface after 3-5 years from installation. Using magnesium provides elite galvanisation which creates a stable barrier, protecting the porous structure of zinc against corrosion issues.  Salt spray tested; this bracket demonstrates more than 20 times the corrosion resistance of standard zinc galvanised steel without magnesium.Features & Benefits: Lindab Magestic Galvanised Steel Fascia Bracket Improved performance in coastal environments  Elite surface protection with magnesium zinc alloy  Minimal environmental impact with reduced zinc resource consumption  Naturally weathers to a dark grey metallic appearance  Quick and easy to install  Long-life with minimal thermal movement  Resistant to vandalism and corrosion  Cost-effective and affordable  Not influenced by the chlorine content of an environment  Range of sizes available to fit your Magestic Half Round guttersWith self-healing properties, this bracket has improved edge protection from the galvanised coating, migrating to repair red rust on scratches and cuts. This fascia bracket has more than 3 times the corrosion resistance of standard galvanised steel in marine environments with ultimate resistance when encountering aggressive environments. This fascia bracket is suitable for domestic or commercial, traditional or modern properties.
product.variant_name: Lindab Magestic 125mm Half Round Steel Fascia Bracket

product.name: Lindab Magestic Round Galvanised Steel Rafter Bracket
product.description:
Lindab Magestic is an improved galvanised steel material for rainwater system and standing seam applications. Magestic offers the same trusted Lindab product designs with a strengthened magnesium zinc alloy coating.
Galvanised steel is already the most environmentally friendly material used in rainwater systems. Magestic has a reduced impact on zinc resources and less than 25% zinc run off into soils compared to hot dipped galvanised steel. New technology has allowed the material to be developed using magnesium to create a stable barrier to protect zinc’s porous structure against corrosion factors. Salt spray tests demonstrate the highest surface protection of any metallic coated steel. Magestic has more than twenty times the corrosion resistance of hot dipped galvanised steel. Unpainted metal gutters naturally weather organically adjusting to the installation environment. Magestic settles to an attractive dark grey metallic appearance within 3-5 years after installation.
Magestic corrosion in not influenced by the chlorine content of the environment. Natural exposure tests demonstrate more than three times the corrosion resistance of standard galvanisation in marine environments. Galvanised coatings migrate to repair red rust on cuts and scratches. Magnesium is more anodic than zinc making the sacrificial properties of Magestic more active than standard galvanisation.
Features

New elite, strengthed magnesium alloy coating
Highest surface protection of any metallic coated steel
Improved performance in coastal environments
Lowest price Lindab Rainwater System
10 Year Warranty
product.variant_name: Lindab Magestic 125mm Half Round Steel Rafter Bracket

product.name: Lindab Magestic 70mm Half Round Galvanised Steel Flex-Fit Fascia Bracket
product.description: This Flex-fit Half Round fascia bracket from Lindab is ideal for holding and supporting gutters. With flexible clips to ease installation, this 70mm bracket has two screw holes to ensure that you get secure and reliable fixings.The Magestic collection of rainwater systems by Lindab has an innovative, long-lasting, and resilient array of products for your rainwater guttering. These products are made of sturdy steel that is galvanised in magnesium zinc alloy, in turn reinforcing their strength. Able to fight corrosion while simultaneously keeping guttering up, these Half Round fascia brackets work especially well when spaced out at 600mm intervals. Features & Benefits: Lindab Magestic 70mm Half Round Galvanised Steel Flex-Fit Fascia Bracket A vast array of gutter diameters available  Galvanised steel is unpainted but in 3-5 years the colour will become a dark grey  Undergone saltwater spray testing (ISO 9227)  Coastal and marine area applications will last effectively  Easy two screw hole installation and flexible clips  Reduced environmental impact.

product.name: Lindab Magestic 210mm Half Round Galvanised Steel Flex-Fit Rafter Bracket
product.description: This Flex-fit Half Round rafter bracket is a product from Lindab's Magestic galvanised rainwater range. It's perfect for projects that lack fascia boards and provides flexible clips that securely support your guttering.The Magestic collection from Lindab is an innovative range of rainwater system products. It uses magnesium zinc alloy to fend off corrosion and rusting, and allows your system to age beautifully. Salt spray tested (ISO 9227), the sturdy and galvanised construction withstands even coastal and marine environments. This bracket is best installed at 600mm spaces, and it can be bent at a specific angle with a KBO bracket bender. product.name: Lindab Magestic Half Round Galvanised Steel Downpipe Spike for Pipe Holder
product.description:
When it comes to creating beautiful, environmentally friendly and maintenance free buildings, using the right materials is everything. The Lindab Steel rainwater systems use the very best in lightweight galvanised steel to create a contemporary, cost effective and eco-friendly guttering system that won’t shrink, split or leak - and looks great too.Galvanised steel is already the most environmentally friendly material used in rainwater systems. Magestic has a reduced impact on zinc resources and less than 25% zinc run off into soils compared to hot dipped galvanised steel. New technology has allowed the material to be developed using magnesium to create a stable barrier to protect zinc’s porous structure against corrosion factors. Salt spray tests demonstrate the highest surface protection of any metallic coated steel. 
Please note this is just the spike for use with the Lindab SSV and SV pipe holders.
This spike is only avaliable in galvanised and the length is determined by how far you want to be away from the wall.

Unpainted metal gutters naturally weather organically adjusting to the installation environment. Magestic settles to an attractive dark grey metallic appearance within 3-5 years after installation.
Magestic corrosion in not influenced by the chlorine content of the environment. Natural exposure tests demonstrate more than three times the corrosion resistance of standard galvanisation in marine environments. Galvanised coatings migrate to repair red rust on cuts and scratches. Magnesium is more anodic than zinc making the sacrificial properties of Magestic more active than standard galvanisation.
Features

New elite, strengthed magnesium alloy coating
Highest surface protection of any metallic coated steel
Improved performance in coastal environments
Lowest price Lindab Rainwater System
10 Year Warranty

product.name: Lindab Magestic Galvanised Steel Gutter Outlet

product.name: Lindab Magestic Half Round Galvanised Steel Stop End
product.description:
The Rectangular guttering from Lindab shares all the benefits of the established Rainline steel rainwater system. The combination of this feature with a box shape creates an elegant alternative to traditional guttering whilst having an added advantage of improved functionality.
Lindab have put a twist on the box gutter with an innovative new rectangular profile. A round bead on the forward-facing lip of the gutter is typical of Swedish style steel guttering.
Lindab Magestic is an improved galvanised steel material for rainwater system and standing seam applications. Magestic offers the same trusted Lindab product designs with a strengthened magnesium zinc alloy coating.
Galvanised steel is already the most environmentally friendly material used in rainwater systems. Magestic has a reduced impact on zinc resources and less than 25% zinc run off into soils compared to hot dipped galvanised steel. New technology has allowed the material to be developed using magnesium to create a stable barrier to protect zinc’s porous structure against corrosion factors. Salt spray tests demonstrate the highest surface protection of any metallic coated steel. Magestic has more than twenty times the corrosion resistance of hot dipped galvanised steel. Unpainted metal gutters naturally weather organically adjusting to the installation environment. Magestic settles to an attractive dark grey metallic appearance within 3-5 years after installation.
Magestic corrosion in not influenced by the chlorine content of the environment. Natural exposure tests demonstrate more than three times the corrosion resistance of standard galvanisation in marine environments. Galvanised coatings migrate to repair red rust on cuts and scratches. Magnesium is more anodic than zinc making the sacrificial properties of Magestic more active than standard galvanisation.
Lindab Rainline Rectangular Gutter Features and Benefits

140mm size provides 11,000mm2 water carrying area
Contemporary aesthetic
Quick and easy to install
Lowest carbon footprint of any rainwater material
Lightweight but wont crack or split
Inexpensive and virtually maintenance free
11 painted colour options with 15 year warranty
Available in unpainted majestic galvanised finish with 10 year warranty

product.name: Lindab Half Round Steel Stop End
product.description: This traditional stop end can be easily installed by sitting inside the 190mm Rainline gutter end and fitted using a roll joint method with recommended non-hardening silicone as a sealant. With your choice from a variety of colours and left or right handed, this stop end can fit your building needs for contemporary or classic, small or large buildings.This stop end is durable, lightweight and long-lasting, manufactured from superior galvanised steel, protected with a thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc and a top coating of coloured polymer grains, providing excellent flexibility and scratch and corrosion resistance. Made with an extra-durable high-build polyester coating, this stop end is protected with an extended life expectancy to an excess of 70 years. With minimal maintenance requirements, this stop end will need the occasional top-up with paint for any scratches and is recommended to be cleaned annually.Features & Benefits: Lindab Half Round Steel Stop End Suitable for commercial or domestic properties  Resistant to corrosion and vandalism  UV stable with resistance to discolouration and high-build polyester powder coating  Variety of colours to choose from  Left or right handed  Cost-effective and affordable  Long-life with minimal thermal movement  Low maintenance needs  Minimal environmental impact

product.name: Lindab Half Round Steel Self-Locking Stop End
product.description: Lindab's painted Half Round self-locking stop ends go at the end of guttering runs and are completely universal - they can be used both left and right-handed. Simply take off the surplus ear and use it as a push-fit connection. Painted with a defensive and quick to clean polyester paint, Lindab creates their Rainline range in an endless assortment of popular colours to match your rainwater systems. The paint coats two hardwearing layers - polymer grains that defend the products against abrasions and galvanised zinc that fends off rust and corrosion. In turn, this self-locking stop end is immensely durable and has an expected life of 70 years.Features & Benefits: Lindab Half Round Steel Self-Locking Stop End Extensive colour palette  Various gutter diameters  Affordable and high-performing  Easy to install  EPDM rubber gasket that forms tight seals without screws or sealants  Light and movable  Minimised use of raw material to help environment  UV stable  Works for domestic and commercial installations.

Painted with a defensive and quick to clean polyester paint, Lindab creates their Rainline range in an endless assortment of popular colours to match your rainwater systems. The paint coats two hardwearing layers - polymer grains that defend the products against abrasions and galvanised zinc that fends off rust and corrosion. In turn, this self-locking stop end is immensely durable and has an expected life of 70 years.Features & Benefits: Lindab Half Round Steel Self-Locking Stop End Extensive colour palette  Various gutter diameters  Affordable and high-performing  Easy to install  EPDM rubber gasket that forms tight seals without screws or sealants  Light and movable  Minimised use of raw material to help environment  UV stable  Works for domestic and commercial installations.

product.name: Lindab Half Round Steel Fascia Bracket
product.description:
Ideal for securing gutters by fixing to vertical fascia boards, this solid 5mm steel-structured bracket should be installed to create a fall of 10mm per 3m run with a maximum of 800mm interval spacing. With a wide variety of colours and diameters to choose from and match your rainwater guttering system.From Lindab's innovative Rainline range of painted steel gutters, this bracket is made from high-quality galvanised steel for a long-lasting and hard-wearing installation. Lightweight and easy to install, this bracket requires minimal maintenance with the occasional touch-up of scratched paint and recommended yearly cleaning. With a protective, thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc, galvanising the steel surface, this bracket is corrosion resistant. With a top coating of durable high-build polyester paint, this bracket is provided with added protection and resistance to damage with superb flexibility, increasing its life expectancy to at least 70 years.  
Features & Benefits: Lindab Half Round Steel Fascia Bracket 1 oval hole and 1 standard screw holeVariety of colours and a range of gutter diametersMinimal maintenanceMade to lastVandal resistantGalvanised steel material with high-build polyester powder coatingQuick and effortless to installCost-effective solutionLow environmental impactElegant design for modern or traditional, refurbishment or new build projects
The polymer grain surface is completely UV stabilised ensuring excellent colourfastness, withstanding discolouration from damaging sun rays.

With a wide variety of colours and diameters to choose from and match your rainwater guttering system.From Lindab's innovative Rainline range of painted steel gutters, this bracket is made from high-quality galvanised steel for a long-lasting and hard-wearing installation. Lightweight and easy to install, this bracket requires minimal maintenance with the occasional touch-up of scratched paint and recommended yearly cleaning. With a protective, thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc, galvanising the steel surface, this bracket is corrosion resistant. With a top coating of durable high-build polyester paint, this bracket is provided with added protection and resistance to damage with superb flexibility, increasing its life expectancy to at least 70 years.

product.name: Lindab Half Round Steel Internal Gutter Corner
product.description:
This Half Round internal gutter angle comes available in a large variety of colours, gutter diameters, and angles in order to suit your every possible need. Environmentally friendly and low maintenance, Lindab’s Steel Rainline range utilises zinc coated steel to ensure reliability and ease.
Installation is made easy with a lightweight structure and without the need for sealants or special tools. With a life expectancy of 70 years and minimal thermal movement to prevent breakages, this gutter angle has a large range of benefits that make for a quality product.
Features & Benefits: Lindab Half Round Steel Internal Gutter Corner Vandal resistantQuality steelVersatile across colours, angles, and dimensionsEnvironmentally kindCost-effective and long-lasting2 gutter joints are required per angleIdeal for modern and traditional buildings, either refurbished or new buildLightweight with straightforward installation processesLow maintenance
product.variant_name: Lindab 100mm Half Round 90dg Internal Gutter Corner - Antique White

product.name: Lindab Half Round Steel External Gutter Corner
product.description: This external gutter angle can easily be installed with self-sealing gutter joints to connect to gutters, is suitable for a variety of roof types including cross-gable or hipped and is ideal for domestic or commercial buildings. With a range of colours, diameters and angles to choose from, this gutter angle can fit your building needs.This superior steel Rainline gutter angle is lightweight, long-lasting and durable and is manufactured from galvanised steel, protected with a thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc and a top layer of coloured polymer grains, providing excellent flexibility, corrosion resistance and scratch resistance. This protective high-build polyester coating is extra-durable with an extended life expectancy of your gutter angle to an excess of 70 years. With low maintenance needs, this gutter angle requires the occasional top-up of paint for any scratches and recommended annual cleaning.Features & Benefits: Lindab Half Round Steel External Gutter Corner Ideal for large or small, classic or contemporary buildings  Resistant to vandalism and corrosion  Affordable and cost-effective  UV stabilised and resistant to discolouration with high-build polyester powder coating  Range of diameters, angles and colours to match your gutters and building needs  Minimal environmental impact  Long-lasting with minimal thermal expansion and contraction  Minimal maintenance requirements

product.description: This external gutter angle can easily be installed with self-sealing gutter joints to connect to gutters, is suitable for a variety of roof types including cross-gable or hipped and is ideal for domestic or commercial buildings. With a range of colours, diameters and angles to choose from, this gutter angle can fit your building needs.This superior steel Rainline gutter angle is lightweight, long-lasting and durable and is manufactured from galvanised steel, protected with a thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc and a top layer of coloured polymer grains, providing excellent flexibility, corrosion resistance and scratch resistance. This protective high-build polyester coating is extra-durable with an extended life expectancy of your gutter angle to an excess of 70 years. With low maintenance needs, this gutter angle requires the occasional top-up of paint for any scratches and recommended annual cleaning.Features & Benefits: Lindab Half Round Steel External Gutter Corner Ideal for large or small, classic or contemporary buildings  Resistant to vandalism and corrosion  Affordable and cost-effective  UV stabilised and resistant to discolouration with high-build polyester powder coating  Range of diameters, angles and colours to match your gutters and building needs  Minimal environmental impact  Long-lasting with minimal thermal expansion and contraction  Minimal maintenance requirements

Made with a built-in EPDM rubber gasket, this gutter joint ensures a watertight seal between your gutters with minimal thermal movement.Available in a wide range of colours and diameters to fit your building and guttering needs, this gutter joint is ideal for large or small, classic or contemporary buildings. Made from superior steel, this gutter joint is durable, long-lasting and lightweight. Manufactured from galvanised steel with a protective thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc and a top layer of coloured polymer grains, this gutter joint is provided with corrosion resistance, scratch resistance and excellent flexibility.Features & Benefits: Lindab Half Round Steel Gutter Joint with Rubber Seal Ideal for domestic or commercial buildings  Resistant to vandalism and corrosion  UV stabilised with discolouration resistance and high-build polyester powder coating  Range of diameters and colours to choose from  Affordable and cost-effective  Long-lasting with minimal thermal movement  Minimal maintenance requirements  Low environmental impactWith an extra-durable high-build polyester coating, this gutter joint is protected with an extended life expectancy to an excess of 7NULL years. With low maintenance requirements, this gutter joint is recommended to be cleaned annually and will need the occasional top-up with paint for any scratches.

product.name: Sky Garden Firebreak Riverstone Border
product.description:
Sky Garden's riverstones are ideal for the perimeter of any green roof. These stones facilitate efficient drainage, ensuring water flows freely off the roof, while giving the system a clean, crisp finish. Enhanced drainage around green roof perimeters prevents waterlogging, promoting healthy plant growth and structural integrity.
Their naturally rounded and washed composition, with diameters ranging from 20 to 40mm, ensures a pleasing, natural look. Whilst also acting as an effective barrier, helping to restrict the spread of plant material to drainage and gutter outlets.
Features & Benefits: Sky Garden Firebreak Riverstone BorderEnsures efficient water drainageEnhancing the overall visual attractiveness of green roofsPerfect for the perimeter of any green roof asthetically and functionally
Crafted from natural riverstone, the stones come in a variety of colors, from browns to greys, offering a visually appealing and functional addition to your green roof system. This natural composition ensures durability and long-lasting performance, making it a perfect choice for green roof perimeters.
